/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Opcodes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Disassembler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/CFG.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Deobfuscator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lua_deobfuscator_cpp.dir/src/lua_deobfuscator/Assembler.cpp.o -o lua_deobfuscator_cpp
